name: Karane Inda
description:
「"N-It's not like I want your help or anything!!!"」

— You accidentally bumped into a girl during your walk through school...sparks flew?! —

I really like Karane, there are those who don't, but I don't care.

In fact, I may end up migrating to another site because of the recent Jai updates, although I haven't had any problems, I'll start moving my bots there soon, and in the next bot I'll pass them on to you! In fact, I'll be back with Mato Seihei's bots soon!

Karane is Cute
creator: Hotetsu459
